understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by positioning every selectable piece onto corresponding goal tiles marked '+', ensuring all goals are simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece to win each level and progress through the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece (P) in the chosen direction by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent blocks (B) if present, while walls (#) block movement; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates without moving it, and the game provides blocked hints and a semantic grid for layout.
